---
title: "Recipe (Filter)"
format: html
---

```{=html}
<style>
  #recipe-search {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 10px 14px;
    font-size: 1rem;
    margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
    border: 1px solid #ccc;
    border-radius: 6px;
    box-sizing: border-box;
  }
  #letter-nav {
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    font-size: 1.1rem;
    line-height: 2;
  }
  #letter-nav a {
    text-decoration: none;
    font-weight: bold;
  }
  .letter-section h2 {
    border-bottom: 2px solid #ddd;
    padding-bottom: 4px;
    margin-top: 1.5rem;
  }
  .recipe-list {
    list-style: none;
    padding-left: 0;
    columns: 2;
    column-gap: 2rem;
  }
  .recipe-item {
    padding: 2px 0;
    break-inside: avoid;
  }
  #no-results {
    display: none;
    color: #888;
    font-style: italic;
    margin-top: 1rem;
  }
</style>

<input type="text" id="recipe-search" placeholder="Search recipes..." />

<div id="letter-nav">
<a href="#section-2">2</a> &middot; <a href="#section-A">A</a> &middot; <a href="#section-B">B</a> &middot; <a href="#section-C">C</a> &middot; <a href="#section-D">D</a> &middot; <a href="#section-E">E</a> &middot; <a href="#section-F">F</a> &middot; <a href="#section-G">G</a> &middot; <a href="#section-H">H</a> &middot; <a href="#section-I">I</a> &middot; <a href="#section-J">J</a> &middot; <a href="#section-L">L</a> &middot; <a href="#section-M">M</a> &middot; <a href="#section-N">N</a> &middot; <a href="#section-O">O</a> &middot; <a href="#section-P">P</a> &middot; <a href="#section-R">R</a> &middot; <a href="#section-S">S</a> &middot; <a href="#section-T">T</a> &middot; <a href="#section-V">V</a> &middot; <a href="#section-W">W</a> &middot; <a href="#section-Y">Y</a> &middot; <a href="#section-Z">Z</a>
</div>

<div class="letter-section" id="section-2">
<h2>2</h2>
<ul class="recipe-list">
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/22nd%20State%20Amber%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">22nd State Amber Ale All Grain Recipe Instructions</a></li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="letter-section" id="section-A">
<h2>A</h2>
<ul class="recipe-list">
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/A%20to%20CTZ%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">A to CTZ IPA All Grain Recipe Instructions</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Amarillo%20Pale%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions%20-%20SHS.pdf">Amarillo Pale Ale All Grain Recipe Instructions - SHS</a></li>

  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Appalled%20Apollo%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Appalled Apollo IPA All Grain Recipe Instructions</a></li>

</div>

<div class="letter-section" id="section-Z">
<h2>Z</h2>
<ul class="recipe-list">
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Zappa%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Zappa IPA All Grain Recipe Instructions</a></li>
</ul>
</div>

<p id="no-results">No recipes match your search.</p>

<script>
  const searchInput = document.getElementById("recipe-search");
  searchInput.addEventListener("input", function () {
    const query = this.value.toLowerCase().trim();
    let anyVisible = false;

    document.querySelectorAll(".letter-section").forEach(function (section) {
      let sectionHasVisible = false;
      section.querySelectorAll(".recipe-item").forEach(function (li) {
        const text = li.textContent.toLowerCase();
        const match = !query || text.includes(query);
        li.style.display = match ? "" : "none";
        if (match) sectionHasVisible = true;
      });
      section.style.display = sectionHasVisible ? "" : "none";
      if (sectionHasVisible) anyVisible = true;
    });

    document.getElementById("no-results").style.display = anyVisible ? "none" : "block";
  });
</script>
```
